title: Millionaires
writer: E. Phillips Oppenheim, Edward Clark, C. Graham Baker
actors: George Sidney, Louise Fazenda, Vera Gordon
plot: Meyer Rubens and his wife Esther own a pressing-shop in New York's Lower East Side. Esther wants to move up to the upper West Side, and her rich sister Reba persuades Meyer to invest in the worthless oil stock sold by her husband....
